hooks.command: Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[DOCS REMINDER] File modified. Before finishing: docs-keeper MUST update AI_AGENTS_SYSTEM/FEATURE_INDEX.md (add or update feature entry) and PROJECT_MAP.md (update public interface if signature changed)."}}'

Write-Output '{"systemMessage":"[POST-CODE CHECKLIST] Before closing: (1) tests written + run? (2) HTML session report generated at docs/sessions/? (3) FEATURE_INDEX.md updated? (4) PROJECT_MAP.md updated?"}'
